The '''Velm system''' was a six-[[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Star system/Legends|system]] in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]], and was home to the planet of [[Velmor/Legends|Velmor]]. It was near [[Myrkr/Legends|Myrkr]], [[Obroa-skai/Legends|Obroa-skai]], and [[Aquaris/Legends|Aquaris]], midway between the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] and the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]].
